acceptance_criteria:
1. RenderError struct with all specified fields
2. std::error::Error impl
3. std::fmt::Display with helpful multi-line format
4. No fallback-related fields
5. Constructors/builders for common error patterns
6. cargo check passes
description:
Implement RenderError - the error type for strict-mode render failures. Error quality is a feature.

Location: crates/baml-bridge/src/prompt/renderer.rs

```rust
#[derive(Debug)]
pub struct RenderError {
    pub path: String,                    // e.g., 'inputs.history.entries[3].output'
    pub ty: String,                      // diagnostic type string
    pub style: String,                   // style requested ('default', 'json', etc.)
    pub renderer: String,                // identifier ('type:TypeName:style' or 'field:FieldName')
    pub template_name: Option<String>,   // if Jinja template
    pub template_location: Option<(usize, usize)>,  // (line, column) in template
    pub message: String,                 // human-readable summary
    pub cause: Option<Box<dyn std::error::Error + Send + Sync>>,
}
```

Implement std::error::Error and std::fmt::Display. The Display should produce a helpful multi-line error:

```
Render failed at 'inputs.history.entries[3].output'
  Type: REPLEntry
  Style: json
  Renderer: type:REPLEntry:json
  Template: repl_entry.jinja:15:8
  Error: undefined field 'outputs' (did you mean 'output'?)
```

NO fell_back_to field - there are no fallbacks in strict mode.
title: Implement RenderError with rich context
